inline_comments.message:
ok but I am missing something
in https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/python-testing-utils/+/94588
the verify job is OK, all targets are executed included the py27
tox is executed according to the requirements indicated
target python is using the correct version of more-itertools.

but the staging job (testsuite-python-testing-utils-robotframework-onap-python-staging-master) is failing due to this lib.
the versions indicated in the repo seem not taken into account.
the itertools version is set to more-itertools==7.2.0 (in test-requirements used in tox setenv, it is precised more-itertools~=5.0.0)
The jobs look very similar, what is teh difference between the 2 jobs?

The jobs seem to take different parameters. 
release does seem to explicitly ask for tox dir:
https://github.com/onap/ci-management/blob/master/jjb/onap-jjb/onap-pypi-template.yaml
This is so that it can be used in the publish script
https://github.com/onap/ci-management/blob/master/shell/pypi-publish.sh
I dont think the verify requests it but it assumes it given the path of the project
https://github.com/onap/ci-management/blob/master/jjb/onap-jjb/onap-pypi-template.yaml
